title: juncus regelii
intro: Juncus regelii, also known as Regel's rush or black club rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in wetlands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Juncus regelii is typically prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves and rhizomes, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
